message.entry: State must be a double scalar or the output of RANDN(''state'').
Seed must be a double scalar.
CLASSNAME input must be a class that supports RANDN, for example, ''single'' or ''double''.
Input following ''like'' must be a variable of a type that supports RANDN. For example, double and single variables support RANDN.
Complex or sparse input following ''like'' is not supported.
